snapshot_metadata.note: SENTINEL tiers + owner-map — NOT the real taxonomy. Proves the FROZEN council reads its tier sets (layer 1b) AND its _TIER1_OWNERS map (layer 2b) FROM the active pack (the source-of-truth flips): under LITHRIM_BENCH_PACK=_tiers_fixture the council's KNOWN_TAXONOMY_CODES must become these sentinel codes (not the 19 healthcare codes) and its _TIER1_OWNERS must become {FIXTURE_SENTINEL_T1: [FIXTURE_SENTINEL_OWNER]} (not the real 8). INERT in normal use: pack discovery is active-pack-only (lithrim_bench.packs._active_packs(active_pack())), so nothing loads this pack unless that env var selects it. REL-5e (BL-3): the snapshot gained the PACK-2c 'lenses' block (role -> codes-you-may-raise, over the SENTINEL codes) — pack.py's judge-consistency gate reads pack_lenses() at council import, so a lenses-less snapshot KeyErrored the layer-1b/2b subprocess proofs.
